# Q2 2022 Digital Trust Index: Content Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Download our Q2 2022 Digital Trust & Safety Index report to explore:

*   What type of content fraud is most prevalent online
*   Which types of sites consumers view as being the spammiest and scammiest
*   How exposure to fraudulent content can cause brand abandonment
*   How content abuse can cause destructive collateral damage across many industries
